title: "Why did the military prioritize Erika": Candace Owens claims Erika Kirk’s emotional WHCD shooting clip was strategically amplified
summary_full: Candace Owens claimed the White House Military Office helped amplify a viral video of Erika Kirk emotionally leaving the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting scene saying, “I just wanna go home.” Owens alleged a leaked internal email described the clip as a powerful emotional asset. No evidence has publicly confirmed the claim, but the accusation has intensified Owens’ ongoing feud with Erika Kirk.
